title: Pair Sum divisible by M
hints: Use modular arithmetic: (a + b) % B = 0 means (a % B + b % B) % B = 0.
For a number with remainder r, we need to find numbers with remainder (B - r) % B.
Use a hashmap to count the frequency of each remainder.
For each element, calculate its remainder modulo B and find the count of elements with the complementary remainder.
Remember to handle modulo operations to prevent integer overflow.
